description_long: This object is a modern tablet device with a large, rectangular touchscreen display dominating the front surface. The screen features vibrant, colorful graphics and is bordered by a slim, uniform black bezel with rounded corners. Attached magnetically to one side is a slim, cylindrical stylus, matching the device's sleek and minimalist aesthetic. The back of the tablet is a matte dark gray with a subtle Apple logo centered and a square camera module located in the top-left corner. The device is extremely thin, with flat edges and minimal visible buttons or ports. The overall design is premium, emphasizing portability and advanced functionality.
description: A sleek, modern tablet with a large touchscreen, slim black bezel, matte gray back, and a magnetic stylus attached to the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vibrant touchscreen display, slim black bezel, and the stylus attached to the right edge.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the extreme thinness of the tablet and the cylindrical stylus attached along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte gray back, centered Apple logo, square camera module in the top-left, and the stylus detached and visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the thin edge of the tablet without the stylus attached.
attribute_screen_presence: Visible screen occupies most of the front surface, rectangular with rounded corners, approximately 11 inches diagonal, centered.
attribute_bezel_design: Slim, uniform black bezel with rounded corners, symmetrical on all sides, smooth finish.
attribute_brand_logo: Visible brand logo centered on the back, medium size, glossy black finish.
attribute_camera_location: Square camera module located at the top-left corner on the back.
